name: wxcode-admin-aurora-analytics
title: Aurora Analytics Admin
description: Aurora Analytics Admin is a polished light-mode dashboard for product and growth teams who need at-a-glance visibility into sessions, conversion, and retention. It pairs a fixed left sidebar with a top search bar, four live KPI tiles, an area chart of weekly sessions, a recent-sessions table, and a right-rail insights panel — all rendered in a single self-contained HTML file. Designed for clarity over decoration: indigo-violet accents on a crisp slate-and-white canvas.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation

query.en: Build me a polished light-mode analytics admin dashboard — left sidebar, topbar with search, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, a sessions area chart, a recent sessions table, and an insights side panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a polished light-mode analytics admin dashboard — left sidebar, topbar with search, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, a sessions area chart, a recent sessions table, and an insights side panel.
